programme.title: Bare Knuckle Fighting Championship
programme.desc: Featuring a massive 11-fight card from Mohegan Sun Arena.

programme.title: BKFC Fight Night Derby: Cooke vs. Holmes
programme.desc: Conor Cooke vs. Anthony Holmes, light heavyweight championship. From Vaillant Live in Derby, U.K.

programme.title: Extreme Fighting Championship 130: Zondi vs. Komana
programme.desc: Ntando Zondi vs. Nathanial Komana. From WSB EFC Arena in Sandton, South Africa.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: From Nashville Municipal Auditorium in Nashville, Tenn.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: From Aug. 16, 2024 at Seminole Hard Rock Hotel & Casino Hollywood in Hollywood, Fla. Featuring the 2024 playoffs - light heavyweight and lightweight divisions.

programme.title: Extreme Fighting Championship 133
programme.desc: Zaakir Badat vs. Ziko Makengele, welterweight championship; Brandon Santos vs. Lihle Ngamnthwini, flyweight. From World Sports Betting Arena in Sandton, South Africa.

programme.title: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From Fluor Field in Greenville, S.C.

programme.title: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: Featuring baseball action from the independent, professional Savannah Bananas World Tour.

programme.title: Banana Ball World Tour
programme.desc: From Joseph P. Riley, Jr. Park in Charleston, S.C.

programme.title: BKFC 48
programme.desc: From Aug. 11, 2023. Features John Dodson vs. JR Ridge for inaugural BKFC flyweight title, plus Keith Richardson vs. Derek Perez in bare-knuckle boxing action from Albuquerque, New Mexico.

programme.title: BKFC 49
programme.desc: The vacant welterweight title is up for grabs at BKFC 49 between Gorjan Slaveski & Jake Lindsey. From Aug. 25, 2023.

programme.title: BKFC 87 Hollywood: Stewart vs. Gaffie
programme.desc: Featuring Kai Stewart vs. Nico Gaffie, Rosalinda Rodriguez vs. Shelby Cannon, plus more in bare-knuckle boxing action from Hollywood, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC KnuckleMania VI
programme.desc: Ben Rothwell vs. Andrei Arlovski, heavyweight title bout; Lorenzo Hunt vs. Yoel Romero, heavyweight.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: Mixed martial arts league where athletes compete in a regular season, postseason and championship.

programme.title: PFL 2024 Season
programme.desc: Main event: Timur Khizriev vs. Brendan Loughnane.

programme.title: Extreme Fighting Championship 130: Zondi vs. Komana
programme.desc: Ntando Zondi vs. Nathanial Komana. From WSB EFC Arena in Sandton, South Africa.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: Boxing in its purest form, with no gloves and hands are wrapped only.

programme.title: International Brawling Championship 1
programme.desc: From Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia on Aug. 28, 2025.

programme.title: International Brawling Championship 3
programme.desc: From Gold Coast Sports & Leisure Center in Gold Coast, Australia.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Fighting Championship
programme.desc: From Feb. 5, 2021 From RP Funding Center in Lakeland, Fla.

programme.title: BKFC: KnuckleMania 2
programme.desc: Features Luis Palomino vs. Martin Brown for BKFC lightweight title, Chad Mendes vs. Joshuah Alvarez. Plus Mike Perry vs. Julian Lane in bare knuckle boxing action from Hollywood, Fla. From Feb. 19, 2022.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Fighting Championship
programme.desc: BKFC 58 features a stacked card from Sofia, Bulgaria.

programme.title: The Bare Knuckle Show
programme.desc: Host Brian Soscia discusses combat sporting news, exclusive BKFC content, interviews & more from the past month.

programme.title: TCL Team Boxing League
programme.desc: Professional boxing with teams of male and female fighters competing in individual one round contests.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: Main event: Jason Jackson defeats Andrey Koreshkov.

programme.title: Professional Fighters League
programme.desc: Main event: Marcirley Alves defeats Leandro Higo.

programme.title: BYB Xtreme Fighting Series
programme.desc: Barrie Jones vs. Tommy Turner; Will Chope vs. Tom Stokes; Ben Robinson vs. Szymon Szynkiewicz. From June 25, 2023 at The O2 Arena in London.

programme.title: BYB 24: Super Brawl Saturday
programme.desc: Heavyweight champion DJ "Da Protégé" Linderman defends his title against undefeated challenger "Hurricane" Ike Villanueva; Harold "Lightning" McQueen takes on Brandon "Slaughterhouse" Birr in a featherweight championship rematch; from Biloxi, Miss.

programme.title: BYB Xtreme Fighting Series
programme.desc: Cub Hawkins and Ryan Jett fight for the Light Heavy Weight Belt; Agnesa Kirakosian battles Shelby Cannon.

programme.title: BYB 26: Mile High Brawl
programme.desc: Professional bare-knuckle boxing from Denver, featuring Lorawnt-t Nelson vs. Tommy Turner.

programme.title: Bare Knuckle Boxing
programme.desc: From May 21, 2023, at Indigo at The O2 Arena in London, England.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: Patricio Pitbull meets undefeated phenom AJ "Mercenary" McKee in the main event. From July 31, 2021.

programme.title: Bellator MMA
programme.desc: All the classic mixed martial arts and kickboxing action from Bellator, featuring some of the best fighters in the world.

programme.desc: Main event: Fabian Edwards defeats Impa Kasanganay.

programme.desc: Mike Perry vs. Thiago Alves, light heavyweight; Mick Terrill vs. Lorenzo Hunt, heavyweight; Ben Rothwell vs. Todd Duffee, heavyweight. From Peacock Theater in Los Angeles.

programme.title: Dirt
programme.sub-title: DIRT: New Zealand: Full Circle Exploration
programme.desc: The DIRT crew comes full circle, exploring New Zealand’s breathtaking adventures and culinary experiences.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County SAR faces its toughest day yet: a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and an avalanche.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: SAR uses helicopters and controlled detonations for a rescue where calculated risks and courage are vital.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A mountain biker crashes on a remote trail. SAR performs a long-line helicopter rescue against the clock.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: A snowboarder is caught in a high-risk avalanche zone. SAR braves the sliding terrain for a risky extraction.

programme.desc: It’s the famous Varsity Week in Val Thorens, as students converge for high-octane thrills on the slopes.

programme.title: Beyond Awestruck
programme.sub-title: Searching for Awe in Lake Tahoe
programme.desc: Dr. Paul Piff begins research at Lake Tahoe to discover what connects us in an era of loneliness and division.

programme.desc: The UCI team at the Tahoe Lab measures how awe impacts happiness, gratitude, relationships, and well-being.

programme.title: Failure is an Option
programme.sub-title: I Made a Houseboat Out of Basic Car Camping Gear

programme.title: Failure is an Option
programme.desc: Carrying water is a hassle on long runs, so I’ve built a robot cooler that follows me on the road and trail.

programme.title: Failure is an Option
programme.sub-title: Jet Powered MTB vs Solar E-Bike
programme.desc: Let’s retrofit a mountain bike with a jet engine and see how fast I can go uphill!

programme.desc: This episode of Huckberry Homes, we drove out to the Texas Hill Country to see our good friend Cameron Duddy.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.sub-title: How This Photographer Manifested His Dream Home on the Oregon Coast
programme.desc: We set our sights on the Oregon coast and flew out to see our friends Ben Moon and Sophie Kuller.

programme.title: Huckberry Homes
programme.desc: We travel to New York to get a rare look inside The Explorers Club headquarters.

programme.title: Beyond Awestruck
programme.desc: The UCI team at the Tahoe Lab measures how awe impacts happiness, gratitude, relationships, and well-being.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.sub-title: Banff & Lake Louise and St. Pete Clearwater
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson explores all sides of Banff & Lake Louise, Canada, and St. Pete Clearwater, Florida.

programme.title: Adventure Cities
programme.desc: Jonathan Thompson sets out to explore the adventurous sides of Amman, Jordan and Charleston, North Carolina.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: Teton County SAR faces its toughest day yet: a lost hiker, a snowmobile crash, and an avalanche.

programme.title: Backcountry Rescue
programme.desc: SAR uses helicopters and controlled detonations for a rescue where calculated risks and courage are vital.
